description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Nuget that builds and packages native backends for multiple platforms. The workflow can be triggered manually with an option to publish the package. It uses a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, windows-2022, and macos-15, and then uploads the native artifacts. A second job, Pack NuGet, depends on the build job, downloads the native artifacts, and packages a NuGet package, optionally publishing it using a provided API key.
